CREATE TABLE emotions (id INTEGER, state mood);
SELECT enum_last(state) FROM emotions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM emotions WHERE state != 'sad');
SELECT e1.id, enum_last(e1.state) FROM emotions e1 JOIN emotions e2 ON e1.id < e2.id GROUP BY e1.id;
WITH latest_emotion AS (SELECT state FROM emotions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT enum_last(state) FROM latest_emotion;
SELECT enum_last(state) FROM (SELECT state FROM emotions WHERE id > 2) AS filtered_emotions;
SELECT enum_last(mood_value) FROM moods WHERE mood_value IN (SELECT state FROM emotions);
SELECT enum_last(NULL::mood) AS last_mood UNION SELECT enum_last(state) FROM emotions;
